description: A configurable rate-limiting and spend-cap enforcement layer for autonomous AI agents. Prevents runaway API costs by establishing hard thresholds on call frequency, concurrency, and total spend. Supports two deployment models: SDK (library imported by the agent) and Proxy (sidecar process the agent routes through â€” recommended for production).

actions.on_rate_limit: Reject call and return 429 status with retry-after header.
actions.on_budget_exceeded: Halt all outbound API calls and notify operator.

deployment_options.sdk: Library imported directly by the agent runtime. Easier to adopt but can be bypassed by buggy agent code.
deployment_options.proxy: Sidecar process or reverse proxy that all agent API calls must route through. Cannot be bypassed. Recommended for production deployments where spend guarantees are required.
